source.extractionMethod: Figma MCP (get_metadata + get_design_context + get_variable_defs) — sample-first 6-cell walk + pattern extrapolation

spec.name: BUNDLE_SPEC.md
spec.status: DRAFT — locks when re-test validates SP-9 motionReduce honored on both Button Spinner (slow) and Switch toggle (skip)
patches: SP-3 textDecoration captured independent of typography token
SP-7 clipsContent always emitted + bindings.size all 7 fields mandatory
SP-8 tokens extractor unions nested-INSTANCE variable refs
SP-9 (v0.3.0): motionReduce policy on animation declarations — Switch uses policy=skip on toggle

counts.$comment: PoC coverage. Toggle interaction declared in component spec (Off↔On with SP-9 motionReduce policy=skip); not yet captured in a separate prototype.json (Step 5 deferred).

smokeTests.name: Step 3 sample cell walks
smokeTests.result: Patterns confirmed across all 5 axes. Active mechanism (layout-driven justify-content flip), state-axis bindings (track-fill state-invariant for Off; border + shadow + opacity vary), Box-type wrapping, sm-size typography surprise, Disabled outer-container opacity, Invalid-ring-at-rest pattern.
smokeTests.artifact: $step2_known_gaps in Switch.component.json (4 gaps closed, 1 documented, 1 partial, 2 open)

smokeTests.name: Reverse-render at consumer (Claude Design)
smokeTests.status: PENDING — Step 8. Will validate SP-9 motionReduce policy=skip end-to-end on Switch toggle (and policy=slow on Button Spinner concurrently). When both pass, v0.3.0 locks.

canonicalTests.name: Pill radius universal (track + thumb)
canonicalTests.result: PASSED across all 6 walked cells (Default/Off, Default/On, Box, Invalid, Disabled, Focus, sm)

canonicalTests.name: Active-axis layout-driven (justify-content flip)
canonicalTests.result: PASSED — cell 428:1425 (Off) emits no justify class (default flex-start); cell 428:1431 (On) emits justify-end class

auditFindings.$comment: Source-DS findings surfaced by this PoC. Bundle reflects reality; findings queued for Apollo v2 maintainer to act on.

F5.summary: Switch lacks Hover state across the 4-value state axis

F8.summary: Disabled uses opacity-50 (Switch) vs tinted color (Button) — cross-component DS inconsistency

F9.summary: Track height 18.4px raw on default-size — no token at this value

F10.summary: Track height 14px raw on sm-size — same class as F9

F11.summary: Invalid state shows destructive ring AT REST (not only on Focus) — apparently intentional Apollo v2 design; documented for downstream consumers

knownGaps.description: 61 of 64 cells not yet emitted as full node trees
Toggle animation timing (duration + easing) inferred only

extensions.companionBundle: ../poc-button (apollo-v2-button-bundle-poc) — sibling Switch + Button bundles share most tokens
extensions.$comment: Consumer-recommended load order. SKILL.md → MANIFEST.json gets the consumer oriented in <2KB. References/ markdown summaries load next. Full JSON data loads only when a specific cell render is requested.
